reviews.comment:
Me llamó la atención lo que está correcto!!! "La buena atención"...
Lo recomiendo... No deberiamos acostumbrarnos a lo que está mal y sorprendernos por lo que está correcto!!!?

(Translated by Google)
What caught my attention was how good the service was! I recommend it... Shouldn't we get used to what's wrong and be surprised by what's right?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZa09uRVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños dan, literalmente, asco. Las paredes están pintadas con excremento porque no hay papel sanitario. Es sumamente antihigiénico. El olor se siente desde la playa de estacionamiento

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are literally disgusting. The walls are painted with feces because there's no toilet paper. It's extremely unhygienic. The smell can be felt from the parking lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNzZ1S0NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención ! Quizá  faltaría mas espacio para tomar algo ya que es muy concurrido y enseguida se llenan las mesas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Perhaps they could use more space to have a drink, as it's very busy and the tables fill up quickly.
